key_facts: EU AI Act full enforcement confirmed: 2026-08-02 — D-74 as of 2026-05-20
GPAI model providers subject to Commission enforcement powers from August 2026
Maximum fine: 3% of global annual turnover or EUR 15 million, whichever is higher
High-risk AI: conformity assessment, technical documentation, human oversight, EU DB registration mandatory
AI Omnibus political agreement: high-risk AI in regulated products extended to 2028-08-02
